metadata.description: Content repurposing tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-repurpose
plugins.description: Content Repurposing Engine for Claude Code. 13 sub-skills covering Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, YouTube Community, Skool, Reddit, Quora, Newsletter/Email, quote graphics, SEO metadata, and publishing calendars. Transforms any content into 10+ platform-optimized outputs with brand voice adaptation, poll generation, and AI image generation via /banana.
